case_title: MIGUEL SALAZAR REYES VS. YUN WING YEE ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED NOV-10-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, YUN WING

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, MIGUEL SALAZAR ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY REYES, MIGUEL SALAZAR YEE, YUN WING

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, MIGUEL SALAZAR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YEE, YUN WING PLAINTIFF SEEKS DISMISSAL OF DEFENDANT DIANA WING. COURT GRANTS DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF DEFENDANT DIANA WING. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF THAT DEFENDANT WAS RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY MECHANICAL PROBLEMS WITH THE CAR AT THE TIME OF SALE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED NOV-10-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WING, DIANA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE.PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER DEIREE MILLIKAN. DEFENDANT YUN WING YEE WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU. DEFENDANT DIANA WING DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY REYES, MIGUEL SALAZAR AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, YUN WING WING, DIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2016 - JUDGMENT.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DIANA WING BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-21-2016 AT 3:30 PM.
